configurePresets.name: mixed
configurePresets.description: LAMMPS-style mixed precision (pos/vel double, forces float, accums double). This is the production build used for scientific runs.

configurePresets.name: fp64
configurePresets.description: Full double-precision reference build. Slower, used for validating the mixed path and as a numerical ground truth in VerifyLab cross-precision-ab.

configurePresets.name: deterministic
configurePresets.description: Mixed precision plus TDMD_DETERMINISTIC_REDUCE=ON per ADR 0010. Bit-reproducible cell placement and energy reductions. ~2% slower than mixed on small systems, grows with N. Intended for catching precision regressions in unit tests and for VL-13/VL-16 sum-order cases — not for production runs.
